title: Just Survive
body:
This is just a bunch of mods to improve vanilla Minecraft gameplay. It includes optimization mods (Sodium, Starlight, Indium, etc.), bugfixes (Debugify, Nether Portal Fix, No Weak Attack, etc.), improved (Realistic Sleep, Inventory Profiles Next, Falling Tree, etc.) and new mechanics (Seasons, Silkly Spawners, Lamb Dynamic Lights), improved world generation (Terra, Yung's collection, etc.).

Perfect for solo surviving or with friends.

Mods you also might want to try:

- [Better End](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend)
- [Better Nether](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether)
- [Vehicle Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/vehiclefix)
